title: Add local-only Atuin shell history
goal: Add Atuin as local searchable shell history for operator sessions without cloud sync, AI features or secret export.

acceptance.assertion: Atuin installation path and shell integration are documented.
Cloud sync and AI features are disabled unless a separate later review explicitly enables them.
A secret/history hygiene note records what must not be entered into shell history.
Basic history search works in the user shell without breaking existing tmux/SSH-Cockpit flows.

metadata.source_request: Evaluate every interesting utility tool and register the resulting plan in Bureau.
